OpenAI

OpenAI, founded in 2015 by Elon Musk, Sam Altman, and others, develops artificial intelligence models. The organization is known for generative AI technologies like the GPT series, including ChatGPT. TechCrunch covers OpenAI’s innovations and impact, providing detailed insights into the AI landscape.
